ref_classifications.reason: The reference occurs in a further-reading citation to Eisberg and Resnick, not as an internal Cohen-Tannoudji figure target.
ref_classifications.evidence: Parsed text and raw PDF page 105 say: 'Eisberg and Resnick (1.3), § 6-3, Fig. 6-8'; this cites another book's Figure 6-8.
